response.justification: James has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse experience across architectures and languages, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, UML modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this executive-level role focused on client advisory and team leadership in a German-speaking context.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack expertise across multiple languages and environments (DLang, Node, TypeScript, Linux)
Strong track record of mentoring and creating educational content (workshops, courses)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or client advisory experience
Leadership roles are technical contributor-focused, lacking formal team or project management oversight
